title: AI-Assisted Voice Navigation for Visually Impaired Users in Food Delivery Applications
description: Developed an AI-powered voice-accessibility system for food ordering, integrating STT, TTS, and Gemini API for conversational interaction.

title: Retinal Fundus Image Classification for Early Glaucoma Detection
description: Trained deep learning models on EyePACS and AIROGS Light v2 datasets for automated glaucoma screening.
